title: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) to Offer New Shoulder Replacement System
text: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) gets FDA nod for the Identity Shoulder System to help surgeons perform anatomic, reverse and revision shoulder replacement with precision.

title: Zimmer (ZBH) Surges 4.2%: Is This an Indication of Further Gains?
text: Zimmer (ZBH) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.

title: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) Procedure Recovery Strong, Margin Woe Stays
text: Zimmer Biomet's (ZBH) recently completed spin-off of the non-core dental and spine business is expected to prove strategic.

title: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) Signs Co-Marketing Agreement for HipInsight
text: Zimmer Biomet's (ZBH) HipInsight is a mixed reality-based visualization tool that will aid surgeons in precise implant placement and alignment during total hip replacement.
